ConnectionStrings._comment: This tells the backend HOW to find your SQL Server. If you installed SQL Server Express with default settings, the line below usually works as-is. 'Trusted_Connection=True' means it uses your Windows login instead of a separate database password.

Jwt._comment: This 'Key' is the secret used to sign login tokens. CHANGE THIS to your own random long text before going live - never share it publicly.

Razorpay._comment: Get these from https://dashboard.razorpay.com after creating a free account. Use the TEST mode keys while developing - they look like rzp_test_xxxxx.

Email._comment: Used to send the 'Welcome' email after someone registers. See backend SETUP_GUIDE.md for how to get a Gmail App Password - do NOT use your normal Gmail password here, it won't work and Google will block it.
